title: Point Blank's Arms Dealer Workstation Recipe
body:
This adds [Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)'s Arms Dealer Workstation Recipe, so instead of just finding it from a village, you can just craft it instead and expand your arms dealer villgers.

The crafting recipe uses items from the main mod.

This is the crafting recipe:

![Point Blank's Arms Dealer Workstation Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8a6cc11ede08bcc107aa90516b5ce213f1e76b3.png)
